findings.annotation_source: Supplementary Table 3 provides DEGs used to annotate LMCD1+ mural cell in prenatal skin. Listed as fine-grained annotation under broad 'Mural cell' category.
findings.organoid_comparison: Even after 19 weeks of culture, mural cells had a low probability of correspondence to adult skin cell states (Extended Data Fig. 2d, Supplementary Table 5).
findings.temporal_presence: Mural cells are present throughout gestation (Fig. 1c, Extended Data Fig. 1d, Supplementary Table 4).
findings.marker_gene: LMCD1 (LIM and cysteine-rich domains 1) is a transcriptional cofactor expressed in cardiac and vascular smooth muscle contexts; its expression defines this pericyte-like mural cell subtype in fetal skin.

evidence_quotes.quote: Mesoderm-derived cells, including skin fibroblasts and endothelial cells, and immune cells were present throughout gestation (Fig. 1c, Extended Data Fig. 1d and Supplementary Table 4).
Even after 19 weeks of culture, fibroblasts, mural and Schwann cells had a low probability of correspondence to adult skin cell states (Extended Data Fig. 2d and Supplementary Table 5).
